headline: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
summary: Viral Nopia synth, teased since 2023, is nearing completion. Creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are preparing it for market launch. MusicRadar got an exclusive first look, revealing upcoming launch details.

headline: Oregon’s Attorney General withdraws effort to delay Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
summary: Oregon AG Dan Rayfield withdraws his bid to delay the Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger. Rayfield had previously sought documents and a 60-day delay for review. The decision clears a hurdle for the major media acquisition.

headline: FL Studio head Constantin Koehncke turns to Reddit for feedback and fun
summary: FL Studio CEO Constantin Koehncke is actively engaging with users on Reddit. He's seeking feedback for the popular digital audio workstation (DAW). This move highlights a direct approach to community involvement and development.

headline: Nintendo’s Talking Flower got a small price cut
summary: Nintendo's quirky Talking Flower toy has received a price reduction. The gadget is based on a character from Super Mario Bros. Wonder. It offers positive affirmations and guides players with whimsical phrases.

headline: TennoCon 2026: Everything Announced at the Warframe and Soulframe Fan Event
summary: TennoCon 2026 provided major announcements for Warframe and Soulframe. The fan event revealed the latest news and trailers for both games. Attendees and fans can now catch up on all the exciting updates.

headline: The Best Deals Today: LEGO Technic McLaren P1, Trails in the Sky 1st Chapter, 4K Blu-rays, and More
summary: A new list of top daily deals has been released. Featured items include LEGO Technic McLaren P1 and Trails in the Sky 1st Chapter. Discounts are also available on various 4K Blu-rays and more.

headline: Ryse: Son of Rome Had Plans To Be Xbox’s Assassin’s Creed
summary: Ryse: Son of Rome was initially envisioned as Xbox's answer to Assassin's Creed. Original plans included exploring multiple historical eras. Critical and commercial struggles ultimately derailed these ambitions for Crytek and Xbox.

headline: EU Says It's Powerless to Stop PlayStation From Killing Discs: 'Companies Are Free to Offer Games and Services in the Manner They See Fit'
summary: The EU states it cannot prevent PlayStation from discontinuing physical game discs. Companies have the freedom to decide their service and game distribution methods. This comes despite widespread online petitions and gamer protests against the potential move.

headline: Watch full highlights as England ride luck in fierce Miami heat
summary: England defeated Norway 2-1 in Miami to advance to the World Cup semi-finals. Jude Bellingham was the hero, scoring both goals, including an extra-time winner. The team battled fierce heat and some luck to secure the comeback victory.

headline: Man arrested in South Yorkshire on suspicion of Ann Widdecombe murder
summary: Police have arrested a man in South Yorkshire on suspicion of Ann Widdecombe's murder. The suspect is identified as a 28-year-old white British national. The arrest marks a significant development in the high-profile case.

headline: US Senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
summary: US Senator Lindsey Graham has died following a brief and sudden illness. A close ally of Donald Trump, Graham was an influential politician. He recently returned from Kyiv after meeting with Ukrainian President Zelensky.

headline: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
summary: Iran has closed the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway. The closure follows US launches of fresh strikes in the region. This escalation comes after an attack on a Cyprus-flagged vessel in the strait.
